description:
Add an "inactive" concept to the package registry. Inactive packages keep all existing versions functional but are excluded from update checks and visually distinguished in docs.

## Design

- Marker: `"inactive": true` in `_meta` of `data.json`
- Update checker: skip packages where `_meta.inactive` is true
- Docs generator: visually distinguish inactive packages (badge, greyed out, or separate section)

## Initial inactive packages

- beads
- beads_rust
- beads_viewer

## Steps

1. Add `"inactive": true` to data.json `_meta` for beads, beads_rust, beads_viewer
2. Update the update-checker logic to skip inactive packages
3. Update the docs generator to distinguish inactive packages
4. Update CLAUDE.md to document the inactive flag

```mermaid
graph LR
    tb-1["Mark packages inactive in data.json"] --> tb-3["Update docs generator"]
    tb-2["Update update-checker to skip inactive"] 
    tb-1 --> tb-2
    tb-3 --> tb-4["Update CLAUDE.md"]
    tb-2 --> tb-4
```
title: Support inactive packages
